svg.title: LithePG result export CSV and JSON serializer evidence
svg.desc: Visual receipt showing strict TDD red/green verification for the new ResultExporter CSV and JSON serializers in LithePGCore.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 2026-06-29 · v1.1 backlog: export formats beyond CSV
failed to compile as expected: cannot find 'ResultExporter' in scope (11 tests written first)
RFC 4180 CSV (CRLF, quoted escaping, NULL→empty) and compact JSON (NULL→null, full string escaping)
ResultExporter suite: 11 tests passed · pure local reformat, no network/credentials/auto-run
✓ swift test: 138 tests across 21 suites (was 127/20) — no regressions
✓ JSON output round-trips through JSONSerialization back to original strings
✓ static added-line secret/injection scan: no findings · independent reviewer dispatched
↷ dogfood_check not run: non-release-impacting core library addition; Docker unavailable
No signing identity, notarization, upload, Homebrew publication, GitHub Release, v1.0 tag, cron changes, or Telegram delivery attempted.
